revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-270

A switch having a plurality of vertical paths, a plurality of horizontal paths, and an electromagnetically operated means of interconnecting any one of the vertical paths with any one of the horizontal paths.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Crossbar switch}}
